info.name: Conductor API
info.description: Conductor API collection for managing tenants, model runners, virtual model runners, load-balancing policies, model access policies, validation, request history, analytics, observability, and backup/restore workflows.

body.raw:
{
  "Name": "My Ollama Server",
  "ApiType": "Ollama",
  "Hostname": "localhost",
  "Port": 11434,
  "UseSsl": false,
  "HealthCheckUrl": "/",
  "HealthCheckMethod": "GET",
  "HealthCheckExpectedStatusCode": 200,
  "RigMonitor": {
    "Enabled": true,
    "Port": 9990,
    "UseSsl": false,
    "CollectDuringHealthCheck": true,
    "RequireReadyz": true,
    "HealthAffectedByRigMonitor": false,
    "TelemetryProfile": "GpuPlacement"
  }
}

{
  "Name": "Updated Endpoint",
  "RigMonitor": {
    "Enabled": true,
    "HostnameOverride": "rigmonitor-host.local",
    "Port": 9990,
    "UseSsl": false,
    "TimeoutMs": 5000,
    "CollectDuringHealthCheck": true,
    "RequireReadyz": true,
    "HealthAffectedByRigMonitor": false,
    "MaxTelemetryAgeMs": 30000,
    "CapabilitiesRefreshIntervalMs": 60000,
    "TelemetryProfile": "Custom",
    "TelemetrySelectors": ["system", "cpu", "memory", "gpu"]
  }
}

{
  "TenantId": "{{tenantId}}",
  "Name": "Default deny model access",
  "Description": "Allow one credential to use one model definition.",
  "DefaultDecision": "Deny",
  "Active": true,
  "Rules": [
    {
      "Name": "Allow credential model use",
      "Priority": 100,
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "SubjectType": "Credential",
      "SubjectId": "{{credentialId}}",
      "ResourceType": "ModelDefinition",
      "ResourceId": "{{modelDefinitionId}}",
      "Actions": ["Completions", "Embeddings", "ListModels"],
      "Active": true
    }
  ]
}

{
  "TenantId": "{{tenantId}}",
  "Name": "Updated model access",
  "Description": "Updated default-deny model access policy.",
  "DefaultDecision": "Deny",
  "Active": true,
  "Rules": [
    {
      "Id": "{{modelAccessRuleId}}",
      "Name": "Allow credential model use",
      "Priority": 100,
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "SubjectType": "Credential",
      "SubjectId": "{{credentialId}}",
      "ResourceType": "ModelDefinition",
      "ResourceId": "{{modelDefinitionId}}",
      "Actions": ["Completions", "Embeddings", "ListModels"],
      "Active": true
    }
  ]
}

{
  "TenantId": "{{tenantId}}",
  "Name": "Draft model access",
  "DefaultDecision": "Deny",
  "Active": true,
  "Rules": [
    {
      "Name": "Allow credential model use",
      "Priority": 100,
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "SubjectType": "Credential",
      "SubjectId": "{{credentialId}}",
      "ResourceType": "ModelDefinition",
      "ResourceId": "{{modelDefinitionId}}",
      "Actions": ["Completions"],
      "Active": true
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.name: Ollama loaded

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "ModelRunnerEndpoint",
  "TargetId": "mre_123",
  "Model": "gemma3:4b",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 4211,
  "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
  "Message": "Model load probe completed on 1 of 1 endpoint(s).",
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_123",
      "EndpointName": "gpu-host-01",
      "ApiType": "Ollama",
      "BaseUrl": "http://gpu-host-01:11434",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "OllamaGenerate",
      "RequestPath": "/api/generate",
      "DurationMs": 4211,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

response.name: vLLM verified

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "ModelRunnerEndpoint",
  "TargetId": "mre_456",
  "Model": "gemma3:4b",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 85,
  "OutcomeCode": "Verified",
  "Message": "Model load probe completed on 1 of 1 endpoint(s).",
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_456",
      "EndpointName": "vllm-host-01",
      "ApiType": "vLLM",
      "BaseUrl": "http://vllm-host-01:8000",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "Verified",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "vLLMListModels",
      "RequestPath": "/v1/models",
      "DurationMs": 84,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [
        "KeepAlive"
      ],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

response.name: Hosted provider verified remote

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "ModelRunnerEndpoint",
  "TargetId": "mre_789",
  "Model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 143,
  "OutcomeCode": "VerifiedRemote",
  "Message": "Hosted provider does not expose host-local loading; metadata verified model availability.",
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_789",
      "EndpointName": "openai-hosted",
      "ApiType": "OpenAI",
      "BaseUrl": "https://api.openai.com:443",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "VerifiedRemote",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "OpenAIListModels",
      "RequestPath": "/v1/models",
      "DurationMs": 142,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [
        "KeepAlive"
      ],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Load Model On Virtual Model Runner

request.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.name: Selected endpoint loaded

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "VirtualModelRunner",
  "TargetId": "vmr_123",
  "Model": "gemma3:4b",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 4211,
  "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
  "Message": "Model load probe completed on 1 of 1 endpoint(s).",
  "RoutingDecision": {
    "Success": true,
    "SelectedEndpointId": "mre_123",
    "EffectiveModel": "gemma3:4b"
  },
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_123",
      "EndpointName": "gpu-host-01",
      "ApiType": "Ollama",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "OllamaGenerate",
      "RequestPath": "/api/generate",
      "DurationMs": 4211,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Search request history entries with pagination and filtering.

query.description: Start of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Default: 1 hour ago
End of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Default: now
Filter by Virtual Model Runner GUID

request.description: Get aggregated request counts grouped by time buckets with success/failure breakdown. Returns time-bucketed data suitable for charting.

query.description: Explicit start of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Overrides range when paired with endUtc
Explicit end of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Overrides range when paired with startUtc
Explicit chart bucket size in seconds
Filter by Virtual Model Runner GUID
Filter by requested or selected model

request.description: Get chart-ready request analytics: request volume, latency, stage breakdown, endpoint summaries, provider/token metrics, and slowest requests.
Get per-request analytics events and normalized timing stages for a captured request history entry.
Get request history entry metadata by ID.
Get full request history detail including request/response headers and bodies.
Delete a single request history entry by ID.
Delete all request history entries matching the filter criteria.

item.name: Analytics Workspace
item.description: Dashboard-oriented analytics for TTFT, token usage, estimate-only cost, users, and access/reliability over the retained 30-day request-history window.

request.description: Get supported analytics metrics, dimensions, named ranges, granularities, retention, and unavailable future export formats.

query.description: Optional tenant filter for system administrators
lastHour, lastDay, lastWeek, lastMonth, or custom

request.description: Get the dashboard summary with request counts, TTFT, token totals, unknown usage count, estimate-only cost, time series, and grouped summaries.
Run a general Analytics workspace query. System administrators can keep TenantId for tenant filtering or remove it for global scope; tenant admins are forced to their authenticated tenant.

query.description: Optional tenant filter for system administrators

request.description: List saved Analytics workspace report definitions in global or tenant scope.
Create a saved Analytics workspace report. Tenant admins are forced to their tenant; system admins can omit TenantId for global scope.
Read one saved Analytics workspace report definition.
Update a saved Analytics workspace report definition.
Delete a saved Analytics workspace report definition.
Answer: what was the average/P95 TTFT for this endpoint and VMR, optionally drilling into a specific user?
Answer: what is total prompt, completion, and total token usage over time for a model?
Answer: what is the estimate-only token cost for this user over the last day?
Review failed request types such as denied or rate-limited requests. Rate-limited requests are counted when HTTP status is 429.

item.name: Get Effective Virtual Model Runner Configuration

request.description: Export all data as a JSON backup.
Restore from a JSON backup. Pass the backup JSON as the request body.
Validate a backup file without applying changes.
